---
title: "About"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/dlpereis
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/seu-perfil
---

I'm an economist and data scientist with a background in quantitative 
research and financial analysis. My work sits at the intersection of 
macroeconomics, statistics, and applied finance — translating data 
into rigorous, reproducible insights.

This site is where I publish analyses, notes, and code on topics I find 
interesting: housing markets, monetary policy, asset pricing, and 
econometric methods. Everything is written in R and built with Quarto.
